---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the starter
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the capability you want.

## Why it belongs in the starter

Explain why this should be part of the default template instead of a project-specific extension.

## Proposed shape

Describe the expected DX, bindings, routes, or docs impact.

## Alternatives considered

List any simpler or narrower alternatives.
